theme.description: Dark, cinematic, and philosophical. A premium dark mode utilizing the requested deep navy (#0F172A) as the void, warm off-white (#F5F5F4) for clarity, and amber (#D97706) as the spark of connection.

hierarchy.h1: font-serif text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-normal tracking-tight leading-tight
hierarchy.h2: font-serif text-4xl md:text-5xl font-normal tracking-tight leading-snug

visual_effects.grain_overlay: Implement a fixed overlay using 'cinematic_grain_texture' (pointer-events-none, mix-blend-overlay, opacity-20) covering the entire viewport to give a 35mm film aesthetic.
visual_effects.custom_cursor: Implement using framer-motion: hide default cursor. Render an amber dot (#D97706, 8px) that follows mouse exactly, and a slightly larger ring (border 1px #D97706, 32px) that trails behind with spring physics.
visual_effects.image_treatment: Images should feel dark and moody. Always use an overlay gradient (e.g., bg-gradient-to-t from-[#0F172A] to-transparent) so they blend seamlessly into the background.

hero_cinematic.description: Hero full bleed image - Misty forest dawn

phone_ritual.description: Concept reveal - exchaning smartphone for button phone

cinematic_grain_texture.description: Grain overlay texture to be applied globally

campfire_night.description: Experience point - Waking to nature / night contrast

component_guidelines.buttons: Strictly minimal. No rounded corners (rounded-none). Background #D97706, text white. Hover states should darken to #B45309. Add a subtle tracking-wide and uppercase to button text.
component_guidelines.cards: For Experience Cards: Use large image backgrounds with gradients falling off to #0F172A at the bottom. The text sits at the bottom over the gradient. No borders or shadows—let the imagery dictate the edge.
component_guidelines.navigation: Fixed to top. Glassmorphism effect. Minimal links. Logo in Playfair Display.
component_guidelines.testimonials: No avatars. Just the quote in Playfair Display (text-2xl or 3xl, italicized) and a subtle attribute line below. Keep it center-aligned in a narrow container for readability.
component_guidelines.countdown_timer: Use a monospace or minimal sans-serif numeral display (Inter) for the digits. Large text (e.g., text-5xl md:text-7xl), separated by colons. Placed over a dark, textured background.
component_guidelines.forms: Anonymous Application form: Use Shadcn components but override styles. Background transparent, border-b only for inputs (border-[#F5F5F4]/30), no bounding box. Very editorial/typeform style.
component_guidelines.admin_dashboard: Strict, structured, functional. Use Inter everywhere. Solid dark gray backgrounds (#131C31). Standard Shadcn data tables and forms for CRUD operations. Keep it utilitarian.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure Playfair Display and Inter fonts are loaded via Google Fonts in index.html.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Only use Playfair Display for headings (h1, h2, h3).
Apply `bg-[#0F172A]` and `text-[#F5F5F4]` to the root `body` element.
Implement the cinematic scroll using framer-motion: sections should fade in and translate slightly upward as they enter the viewport.
Use standard HTML/Tailwind for marketing layout. Use Shadcn components for the Application Form and the entire Admin Dashboard.
Implement a globally available 'grain' overlay div with pointer-events-none.
Implement the custom cursor. Provide a fallback if user is on mobile/touch device.
All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='apply-cta-button').
Never use generic placeholder images. Use the exact URLs provided in the media section.
Avoid generic tech/corporate language. Follow the 'short sentences. Evokes feeling over explanation' brand voice.
